name: mrn/security-audit-tooling
description: Repo-local WordPress security audit tooling for MRN source code.

scripts.security:phpstan: php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --configuration=phpstan.neon.dist --memory-limit=2G plugins mu-plugins stack/themes
scripts.security:semgrep: mkdir -p .tmp/semgrep-home && HOME=$PWD/.tmp/semgrep-home SEMGREP_SEND_METRICS=off semgrep scan --config semgrep/security-audit.yml --error --no-git-ignore plugins mu-plugins stack/themes
